risks.description: Converting full backlog within 90 days requires sustained throughput the team has not previously achieved
risks.mitigation: Onboarding process redesigned, capacity reallocated, backlog triaged by value, daily fulfillment standup, weekly conversion tracking

risks.description: Pipeline and conversion assumptions underpin Q2-Q3 revenue ramp; deals not yet closed
risks.mitigation: New underwriting standards, pipeline risk-adjusted, sales restructured and re-incentivised, weekly commit vs actual

risks.description: Sales, account management and onboarding personnel critical; restructuring creates attrition risk
risks.mitigation: Top performers identified, retention packages being confirmed, all-hands communication completed

risks.description: Tampa office subletting negotiation, no LOC available; $70K/month saving modeled from 10/01/2026
risks.mitigation: Fallback: early lease surrender or further space reduction

risks.description: Agreement to defer LOC repayment until business sale closing not confirmed; if demanded before closing, immediate liquidity event
risks.mitigation: Active negotiation, legal counsel engaged, sale process timeline shared

risks.description: $1.3M committed, $3M needed through year end = $1.7M gap; balance sheet and lender default status challenge securing additional leases
risks.mitigation: $4M facility partially addresses; backlog triaged to prioritise highest-value deployments
